response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed video and identified a vocal performance of 'Deal with the devil' followed by a talking segment. 
2. Extracted metadata from on-screen text: Song title 'Deal with the devil', original artist Tia. 
3. Performed web search for 'Deal with the devil Tia Japanese and English lyrics'. 
4. Compiled lyrics and structured the JSON. The second part of the video is a non-vocal conversational segment.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a 3D VTuber, Akio Airi, performing the song "Deal with the devil" (originally by Tia), followed by a conversational segment and interaction with a roulette wheel.

scenes.description: Akio Airi performs 'Deal with the devil' on a stage set. Text 'Deal with the devil' appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Deal with the devil
Uhhhhnn koufun tamaranai wa suriru
Dare ni mo sawarasenai kono money
A million dollars
I'd say raise
Saa come on kakugo kimete
Furue takabure My heart
Hoshigaru you ja ne mada beibii
Dare ni mo makenai kanjisasete Love me honey
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Deal with the devil
Uhhhh, the excitement, I can't stand the thrill
I won't let anyone touch this money
A million dollars, I'd say raise
Come on, make up your mind
Shake, be excited, my heart
If you want it, you're not ready yet, baby
I won't lose to anyone, let me feel it, love me honey

scenes.description: Akio Airi talks to the audience and interacts with a stage prop, a roulette wheel.
